ns0:entry.ns0:title: 1jehuang/jcode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/1jehuang/jcode
Language: rust
The most intelligent agent harness for code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlexsJones/llmfit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlexsJones/llmfit
Language: rust
Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DioxusLabs/dioxus
Language: rust
Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/OpenShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/OpenShell
Language: rust
OpenShell is the safe, private runtime for autonomous AI agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Pumpkin-MC/Pumpkin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Pumpkin-MC/Pumpkin
Language: rust
Empowering everyone to host fast and efficient Minecraft servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZSeven-W/openpencil
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZSeven-W/openpencil
Language: rust
The world's first open-source AI-native vector design tool and the first to feature concurrent Agent Teams. Design-as-Code. Turn prompts into UI directly on the live canvas. A modern alternative to Pencil.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kata-containers/kata-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers
Language: rust
Kata Containers is an open source project and community working to build a standard implementation of lightweight Virtual Machines (VMs) that feel and perform like containers, but provide the workload isolation and security advantages of VMs. https://katacontainers.io/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rtk-ai/rtk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk
Language: rust
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: t8y2/dbx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/t8y2/dbx
Language: rust
20 MB lightweight cross-platform database client for 70+ databases, including MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, SQL Server, and Dameng. Built-in AI, MCP Server, CLI, desktop and Docker. | 轻量级跨平台数据库管理工具，支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQLite、Redis、MongoDB、达梦等 70+ 数据库，提供桌面端、Docker、CLI、内置 AI 助手和 MCP Server。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tokio-rs/topcoat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tokio-rs/topcoat
Language: rust
A batteries-included framework for building web apps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tonhowtf/omniget
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tonhowtf/omniget
Language: rust
Open-source desktop app for downloading, organizing and studying media. Native cross-platform (Tauri + Rust + Svelte). PDF/EPUB reader with focus mode, timestamped notes and spaced repetition. Media downloads via yt-dlp (1.800+ sites). Extensible plugin system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: transact-rs/sqlx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/transact-rs/sqlx
Language: rust
🧰 The Rust SQL Toolkit. An async, pure Rust SQL crate featuring compile-time checked queries without a DSL. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.
